title: A Simile.
content:
("Soyez comme l'oiseau.")

    [XXXIII. vi.]


    Thou art like the bird
    That alights and sings
    Though the frail spray bends - 
    For he knows he has wings.

    FANNY KEMBLE (BUTLER)
meaning:
"A Simile." is a quintessential example of Victor-Marie Hugo's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
